Projects

Selected Research & Software

A collection of projects spanning earthquake early warning systems, seismic data visualization, machine learning for earthquake detection, and geophysical computation tools.

Seismic EEW Pipeline

Infrastructure · 2024

Real-time earthquake early warning data pipeline processing 58-station seismic network data. Features optimized STA/LTA P-wave detection, magnitude estimation using Mpd method, and hypocenter calculation via HYPO71 integration.

PythonObsPyFDSNPyQt5Folium
View Code

Seismogram Visualizer

Visualization · 2024

Interactive web application for visualizing seismic waveforms with real-time data fetching from FDSN networks. Features waveform display, filtering controls, and travel-time calculations.

JavaScriptD3.jsFDSNWeb APIs
Live Demo View Code

Earthquake Knowledge Graph

Data Science · 2024

Automated system for extracting and indexing seismic metadata into a structured knowledge graph. Enables advanced querying of earthquake catalogs and pattern analysis across historical seismic data.

PythonKnowledge GraphRDFSPARQL
View Code

ML Earthquake Classifier

Machine Learning · 2024

Machine learning-based system for earthquake detection and classification using ensemble methods. Evaluates different ML approaches for P-wave detection and magnitude prediction.

PythonScikit-learnTensorFlowObsPy
View Code

Seismic Data Processing Scripts

Tools · 2023

Collection of Python scripts for seismic data processing including filtering, spectral analysis, and ground motion calculations using ObsPy.

PythonObsPyNumPySciPy
View Code

Gravitational Terrain Correction Tool

Tools · 2023

Interactive GUI application for calculating gravitational terrain corrections using digital elevation models. Built for geophysics surveys.

PythonMATLABGDALTkinter
View Code
